eval_results.name: level-judgment
eval_results.key_finding: Level 1 (Skip) correctly identified for typo fix; reasoning includes 'trivial', single file, no logic change

eval_results.name: proposal-generation
eval_results.key_finding: Complete proposal.md generated with Background, Scope, Goals, Non-Goals, Implementation Plan; all 3 features (login, register, password reset) covered

eval_results.name: scope-extraction
eval_results.key_finding: Email and SMS correctly extracted as In-Scope; push notifications correctly extracted as Out-of-Scope with explicit source text citation

eval_results.name: template-compliance
eval_results.key_finding: 6/6 required Level 2 sections present; H2 heading hierarchy correct; metadata (version, status, date) all present

eval_results.name: bilingual-support
eval_results.key_finding: Mixed EN+ZH input correctly parsed; English proposal generated with correct sections; dark mode feature intent fully preserved

strengths: Accurate OpenSpec level classification (L1/L2/L3) with clear reasoning
Complete proposal.md generation covering all required Level 2 sections
Precise scope extraction including explicit exclusions from natural language
Strict template compliance with correct heading hierarchy and metadata
Robust bilingual (ZH/EN) input handling with consistent English output generation
recommendations: Test Level 3 (Full) generation including tasks.md alongside proposal.md
Add edge cases for ambiguous level classification (borderline L1/L2 scenarios)
Test scope extraction with implicit exclusions not explicitly stated by the user
